mavlink-battery-status-bounds.pr_title: mavlink: receiver battery_status prevent out of bounds access
mavlink-battery-status-bounds.heuristic: Locate the first while-loop inside handle_message_battery_status that references both cell_count<10 and battery_mavlink.voltages[cell_count]. If the cell_count<10 guard appears before the voltages[cell_count] dereference in the loop header, the bounds check is in place (consistent with the claim). If the dereference appears before the guard, the loop reads voltages[cell_count] before bounds-checking cell_count (conflicts with the claim).

mavlink-battery-status-bounds-pre.description: Parent of the BATTERY_STATUS bounds fix (PR #18411). The while-loop reads battery_mavlink.voltages[cell_count] before checking cell_count<10, so cell_count==10 yields an out-of-bounds read before the guard rejects the iteration.

mavlink-battery-status-bounds-post.description: The BATTERY_STATUS bounds fix from PR #18411. Reorders the while-loop condition so cell_count<10 short-circuits before the voltages[cell_count] access.
